2603.18427.title: R&D: Balancing Reliability and Diversity in Synthetic Data Augmentation for Semantic Segmentation
2603.18427.paper_summary: Collecting and annotating datasets for pixel-level semantic segmentation tasks are highly labor-intensive. Data augmentation provides a viable solution by enhancing model generalization without additional real-world data collection. Traditional augmentation techniques, such as translation, scaling, and color transformations, create geometric variations but fail to generate new structures. While generative models have been employed to extend semantic information of datasets, they often struggle to maintain consistency between the original and generated images, particularly for pixel-level tasks. In this work, we propose a novel synthetic data augmentation pipeline that integrates controllable diffusion models. Our approach balances diversity and reliability data, effectively bridging the gap between synthetic and real data. We utilize class-aware prompting and visual prior blending to improve image quality further, ensuring precise alignment with segmentation labels. By evaluating benchmark datasets such as PASCAL VOC and BDD100K, we demonstrate that our method significantly enhances semantic segmentation performance, especially in data-scarce scenarios, while improving model robustness in real-world applications. Our code is available at \href{https://github.com/chequanghuy/Enhanced-Generative-Data-Augmentation-for-Semantic-Segmentation-via-Stronger-Guidance}{https://github.com/chequanghuy/Enhanced-Generative-Data-Augmentation-for-Semantic-Segmentation-via-Stronger-Guidance}.
2603.18427.paper_summary_zh: 收集和註釋像素級語義分割任務的數據集非常耗費人力。數據增強提供了一個可行的解決方案，通過增強模型的泛化能力，而無需額外的現實世界數據收集。傳統的增強技術，如平移、縮放和顏色變換，雖然能創造幾何變化，但無法生成新的結構。雖然生成模型已被用來擴展數據集的語義信息，但它們在保持原始圖像和生成圖像之間的一致性方面經常面臨挑戰，特別是在像素級任務中。在這項工作中，我們提出了一個新穎的合成數據增強管道，整合了可控擴散模型。我們的方法在多樣性和可靠性數據之間取得平衡，有效地彌合了合成數據和真實數據之間的差距。我們利用類別感知提示和視覺先驗融合進一步改善圖像質量，確保與分割標籤的精確對齊。通過評估基準數據集，如 PASCAL VOC 和 BDD100K，我們展示了我們的方法顯著提升了語義分割性能，特別是在數據稀缺的情況下，同時提高了模型在現實世界應用中的穩健性。我們的代碼可在 \href{https://github.com/chequanghuy/Enhanced-Generative-Data-Augmentation-for-Semantic-Segmentation-via-Stronger-Guidance}{https://github.com/chequanghuy/Enhanced-Generative-Data-Augmentation-for-Semantic-Segmentation-via-Stronger-Guidance} 獲得。
2603.18427.author: Huy Che et.al.
2603.18427.authors: Huy Che, Dinh-Duy Phan, Duc-Khai Lam
